message:
perf(mux): optimize video encoding with vImage scaling

- Use Accelerate framework vImage for hardware-accelerated downscaling
  (24ms -> 9ms, 2.5x faster)
- Remove frame change detection skip - send all frames, let encoder
  handle redundancy with P-frames
- Add detailed encode timing breakdown (scale/pixbuf/submit/complete)
- Link Accelerate framework in build.zig

Combined with previous max_pixels scaling, encode time dropped from
37ms to ~21ms, achieving 26-27 FPS (up from 11-12 FPS).
